chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.184 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.4112/2024 11.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for the applicant a/w Mr. Naseer Ahmed Abbasi Advocate. Syed Asif Ali, Advocate for the respondent. Pursuant to order dated 17.03.2026, learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned order and remand the matter for adjudication afresh in accordance with law before the learned Tribunal. Order accordingly. This reference application is disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Asif
